_meta.name: TikTok For Business — Design Tokens
_meta.source: TikTok For Business Brand Guidelines (70pp PDF)
_meta.method: pdftotext (exact written values) + pdftoppm PNG render read with vision
_meta.notes: The brand book states 'Do not create new colors.' The 4 CORE brand colors below are the canonical, written-in-doc values (with Pantone/RGB/CMYK). The 'derived' neutrals/state tints are NOT new brand colors — they are functional UI surfaces (tints/shades of the doc's own Black/White) needed to build accessible web pages, kept deliberately neutral so brand colors stay the only chromatic accents per the doc's 'one brand color per composition' + 'create focus with black or white' rules.

usage.razzmatazz: Primary brand color. Full-bleed section backgrounds, primary CTA buttons, and to highlight ONE keyword/phrase in a headline (the only color allowed to emphasize text on black OR white).
usage.splash: Secondary/accent. Full-bleed section backgrounds, borders/strokes, image-frame borders, decorative shapes. MUST NOT highlight text (fails accessibility). On Splash, foreground text/icons are Black.
usage.black: Default page background and default text on white. Pairs with one brand color to create focus.
usage.white: Default text on dark, card/surface fill on dark layouts, and the light-mode page background.
usage.neutrals: Greys are for UI structure only (borders, muted captions, light panels). Per the doc, never use grey/neutral as a primary composition background — reserve full-bleed for Black, White, Razzmatazz, or Splash.
usage.rule: Limit to one brand color per composition; pair it with black or white. Two colors max in a single text treatment (e.g. Black + Razzmatazz or White + Razzmatazz).

families.heading: 'Sofia Pro', Spartan, 'League Spartan', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
families.emphasis: 'Sofia Pro Soft', 'Baloo 2', 'Sofia Pro', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

brandFamilies.note: Sofia Pro = headlines/primary; Sofia Pro Soft = emphasis only, in combination with Sofia Pro. Doc-approved free web substitutes: Spartan & Roboto (Google), Helvetica/Arial (system), SF Pro (Apple). Sofia Pro Soft substitutes: Houschka Round, SF Pro Rounded, Arial Rounded — closest free Google option is Baloo 2.

tracking.headline: -0.02em
tracking.caption: 0.01em
tracking.note: Doc specifies -10pt tracking for headline/subhead/body and +10pt for caption.

rules.do: Emphasize keywords with Razzmatazz + Sofia Pro Soft. Left or center align.
rules.dont: No all-caps headlines, no all-lowercase headlines, no gradients/shadows on type, no stacked type, no distortion, never use Bold weight for body copy, keep sizes clearly distinct.

spaceNote: 8px rhythm (the design tool kit's 'Min Circle Diameter' steps of 20/30/50px and the 4pt type minimums imply an 8px-based grid). Section vertical padding uses the larger steps (96/128px).

radius.source: Doc: rounded-rectangle roundness limited to 25%, 50%, 100%. 100% roundness reserved for CTA buttons (pills). Image masks use 25% or 50% roundness.

shadow.name: none
shadow.note: Brand book: 'Do not apply drop shadows or other effects.' Depth is created with flat color blocks + layered shapes, NOT shadows.

shapes.note: Tool kit shapes (bubbles, rounded rectangles, patterns, emphasis marks) derive from the two circles in the TikTok logo. Bubbles/pills used as CTAs. Images may rotate in 10deg increments.
